book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. MARK

verses.text: And he began again to teach by the sea side: and there was gathered unto him a great multitude, so that he entered into a ship, and sat in the sea; and the whole multitude was by the sea on the land.
And he taught them many things by parables, and said unto them in his doctrine,
\+w Hearken\+w*; \+w Behold\+w*, \+w there went out\+w* \+w a sower\+w* \+w to sow\+w*:

\+w And\+w* \+w it came to pass\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w he sowed\+w*, \+w some\+w* \+w fell\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the way side\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the fowls\+w* \+w of the air\+w* \+w came\+w* \+w and\+w* devoured \+w it\+w* \+w up\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w some\+w* \+w fell\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w stony ground\+w*, \+w where\+w* \+w it had\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w much\+w* \+w earth\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w immediately\+w* \+w it sprang up\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w it had\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w depth\+w* \+w of earth\+w*:
\+w But\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w the sun\+w* \+w was up\+w*, \+w it was scorched\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w because\+w* \+w it had\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w root\+w*, \+w it withered away\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w some\+w* \+w fell\+w* \+w among\+w* \+w thorns\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the thorns\+w* \+w grew up\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w choked\+w* \+w it\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w it yielded\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w fruit\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w other\+w* \+w fell\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w ground\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w did yield\+w* \+w fruit\+w* \+w that sprang up\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w increased\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w brought forth\+w*, \+w some\+w* \+w thirty\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w some\+w* \+w sixty\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w some\+w* \+w an hundred\+w*.
And he said unto them, \+w He that hath\+w* \+w ears\+w* \+w to hear\+w*, \+w let him hear\+w*.
And when he was alone, they that were about him with the twelve asked of him the parable.

And he said unto them, \+w Unto you\+w* \+w it is given\+w* \+w to know\+w* \+w the mystery\+w* \+w of the kingdom\+w* \+w of God\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w unto them\+w* \+w that are without\+w*, \+w all\+w* \+add these\+add* \+w things\+w* \+w are done\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w parables\+w*:

\+w That\+w* \+w seeing\+w* \+w they may see\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w perceive\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w hearing\+w* \+w they may hear\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w understand\+w*; \+w lest at any time\+w* \+w they should be converted\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+add their\+add* \+w sins\+w* \+w should be forgiven\+w* \+w them\+w*.
And he said unto them, \+w Know ye\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w this\+w* \+w parable\+w*? \+w and\+w* \+w how then\+w* \+w will ye know\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w parables\+w*?
¶ \+w The sower\+w* \+w soweth\+w* \+w the word\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w are they\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the way side\+w*, \+w where\+w* \+w the word\+w* \+w is sown\+w*; \+w but\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w they have heard\+w*, \+w Satan\+w* \+w cometh\+w* \+w immediately\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w taketh away\+w* \+w the word\+w* \+w that was sown\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w their\+w* \+w hearts\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w are they\+w* \+w likewise\+w* \+w which are sown\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w stony ground\+w*; \+w who\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w they have heard\+w* \+w the word\+w*, \+w immediately\+w* \+w receive\+w* \+w it\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w gladness\+w*;

\+w And\+w* \+w have\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w root\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w themselves\+w*, \+w and so\+w* \+w endure\+w* \+w but\+w* \+w for a time\+w*: \+w afterward\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w affliction\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w persecution\+w* \+w ariseth\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w the word’s sake\+w*, \+w immediately\+w* \+w they are offended\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w are they\+w* \+w which are sown\+w* \+w among\+w* \+w thorns\+w*; \+w such as hear\+w* \+w the word\+w*,

\+w And\+w* \+w the cares\+w* \+w of this\+w* \+w world\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the deceitfulness\+w* \+w of riches\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the lusts\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w other things\+w* \+w entering in\+w*, \+w choke\+w* \+w the word\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w it becometh\+w* \+w unfruitful\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w they which are sown\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w ground\+w*; \+w such as\+w* \+w hear\+w* \+w the word\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w receive\+w* \+add it\+add*, \+w and\+w* \+w bring forth fruit\+w*, \+w some\+w* \+w thirtyfold\+w*, \+w some\+w* \+w sixty\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w some\+w* \+w an hundred\+w*.

¶ And he said unto them, \+w Is\+w* \+w a candle\+w* \+w brought\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w be put\+w* \+w under\+w* a \+w bushel\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w under\+w* \+w a bed\+w*? \+w and not\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w be set\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w a candlestick\+w*?

\+w For\+w* \+w there is\+w* \+w nothing\+w* \+w hid\+w*, \+w which\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w be manifested\+w*; \+w neither\+w* \+w was any thing kept\+w* \+w secret\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w it should come\+w* \+w abroad\+w*.
\+w If\+w* \+w any man\+w* \+w have\+w* \+w ears\+w* \+w to hear\+w*, \+w let him hear\+w*.

And he said unto them, \+w Take heed\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w ye hear\+w*: \+w with\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w measure\+w* \+w ye mete\+w*, \+w it shall be measured\+w* \+w to you\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w unto you\+w* \+w that hear\+w* \+w shall more be give\+w*n.

\+w For\+w* \+w he that\+w* \+w hath\+w*, \+w to him\+w* \+w shall be given\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w he that\+w* \+w hath\+w* \+w not\+w*, \+w from\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w shall be taken\+w* \+w even\+w* \+w that which\+w* \+w he hath\+w*.
¶ And he said, \+w So\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of God\+w*, \+w as\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w a man\+w* \+w should cast\+w* \+w seed\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the ground\+w*;

\+w And\+w* \+w should sleep\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w rise\+w* \+w night\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w day\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the seed\+w* \+w should spring\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w grow up\+w*, \+w he\+w* \+w knoweth\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w how\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w the earth\+w* \+w bringeth forth fruit\+w* \+w of herself\+w*; \+w first\+w* \+w the blade\+w*, \+w then\+w* \+w the ear\+w*, \+w after that\+w* \+w the\+w* \+w full\+w* \+w corn\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the ear\+w*.
\+w But\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w the fruit\+w* \+w is brought forth\+w*, \+w immediately\+w* \+w he putteth in\+w* \+w the sickle\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w the harvest\+w* \+w is come\+w*.
¶ And he said, \+w Whereunto\+w* \+w shall we liken\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of God\+w*? \+w or\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w what\+w* \+w comparison\+w* \+w shall we compare\+w* \+w it\+w*?

\+add It is\+add* \+w like\+w* \+w a grain\+w* \+w of mustard seed\+w*, \+w which\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+w it is sown\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the earth\+w*, \+w is\+w* \+w less than\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w the seeds\+w* \+w that be\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the earth\+w*:

\+w But\+w* \+w when\+w* \+w it is sown\+w*, \+w it groweth up\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w becometh\+w* \+w greater than\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w herbs\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shooteth out\+w* \+w great\+w* \+w branches\+w*; \+w so that\+w* \+w the fowls\+w* \+w of the air\+w* \+w may\+w* \+w lodge\+w* \+w under\+w* \+w the shadow\+w* \+w of it\+w*.
And with many such parables spake he the word unto them, as they were able to hear it.
But without a parable spake he not unto them: and when they were alone, he expounded all things to his disciples.
And the same day, when the even was come, he saith unto them, \+w Let us pass over\+w* \+w unto\+w* \+w the other side\+w*.
And when they had sent away the multitude, they took him even as he was in the ship. And there were also with him other little ships.
And there arose a great storm of wind, and the waves beat into the ship, so that it was now full.
And he was in the hinder part of the ship, asleep on a pillow: and they awake him, and say unto him, Master, carest thou not that we perish?
And he arose, and rebuked the wind, and said unto the sea, \+w Peace\+w*, \+w be still\+w*. And the wind ceased, and there was a great calm.
And he said unto them, \+w Why\+w* \+w are ye\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w fearful\+w*? \+w how is it that\+w* \+w ye have\+w* \+w no\+w* \+w faith\+w*?
And they feared exceedingly, and said one to another, What manner of man is this, that even the wind and the sea obey him?
